reason: Defines the core-shell boundary, IPC serialization requirements, and required Rust/Tauri verification for status source changes.
Defines where reusable core status behavior and Tauri-specific adapters belong.
Requires TypeScript IPC payload types to stay aligned with beacon-core enums and structs.
Defines HUD shell contracts and verification commands for frontend and Tauri changes.
This change spans SQLite source adapter, Rust core payloads, Tauri IPC, and React display.
